## Summary

- describe the change in one or two sentences

## Why

- explain the problem, context, or motivation

## Scope

- list the main packages or docs affected
- call out any API or behavior changes explicitly

## Validation

- [ ] `make fmt`
- [ ] `make vet`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make build-examples`

## Documentation

- [ ] updated README and/or docs when public behavior changed
- [ ] updated changelog when appropriate

## Release Notes

- note any migration, compatibility, or versioning impact
